customerInsights.title: Customer summary

regional.title: Regional orders

ProductsExport.title: Export products to CSV
ProductsExport.subtitle: Export store products to a CSV file with custom filters.

scope.allHelp: Every product in the store (no filters).
scope.filterHelp: Based on the filters selected below.

step1.title: Filter and columns
step1.subtitle: Decide which products to export and which columns to include.
step1.disabledNoMatches: No products match the current filter

review.title: Review and confirm
review.subtitle: Inspect a sample of the output and tweak format options before pulling the trigger.
review.formatHelp: Changing any of these auto-refreshes the preview below.
review.previewSubtitle: Showing the first {rows} rows of the final output
review.previewCapNote: Only {rows} sample rows are shown here for performance — rendering thousands of rows in a preview table would freeze your browser. When you click Generate, all {total} matching rows are processed.

columns.title: Columns
columns.subtitle: Columns that appear in the output file. Drag to reorder.

exporting.title: Exporting
exporting.subtitle: Your CSV is being generated.
exporting.slowChunk: Processing row {row} — this may take a few seconds

done.noLongerAvailable: File is no longer available — generate a new export to download again.

history.title: Product export history
history.subtitle: Every past export. Downloads are available for 24 hours.

ProductsImport.title: Import products from CSV
ProductsImport.subtitle: Import store products from a CSV or XLSX file, or update existing records.

step1.title: Import products from a CSV file
step1.subtitle: Import store products from a CSV or XLSX file, or update existing records.
step1.dropOrClick: Drop the file here or click to browse
step1.pasteHint: You can also paste CSV with Ctrl+V
step1.accepted: Accepted formats: CSV, TXT, XLSX  •  max {mb} MB

updateExisting.label: Update existing products
updateExisting.help: Products whose SKU matches a row in the file will be updated. Products not in the file are not deleted.

step2.title: Map CSV columns to product fields
step2.subtitle: Connect each CSV column to its matching product field. Leave columns you don't want to import set to "Don't import".

mapping.title: Map CSV columns to product fields
mapping.subtitle: Connect each CSV column to its matching product field. Leave columns you don't want to import set to "Don't import".
mapping.presetApplied: Applied previous mapping «{name}» — click to change
mapping.previewFirstHint: Click "Preview" first to enable the "Start import" button

review.title: Review and confirm
review.subtitle: Simulation result over the uploaded file — nothing has changed in the database yet.
review.controlsHelp: Decide what this run should change. You can narrow the scope before pulling the trigger.

updateExisting.label: Update existing products
updateExisting.help: Products that share a SKU with file rows are updated.

skipNew.label: Skip new products
skipNew.help: Rows that would create a new product are skipped.

skipUpdates.label: Skip updates
skipUpdates.help: Rows that would update an existing product are skipped.

skipWarningRows.label: Skip rows with warnings
skipWarningRows.help: Any row flagged by anomaly detection won't be applied.

preview.title: Import preview
preview.subtitle: Simulation result over the uploaded file — nothing has changed in the database yet.
preview.noCreate: No new products will be created.
preview.skipMore: {count} more rows will be skipped for the same reasons.

skipReasonHelp.duplicate_sku: A product with this SKU already exists and "Update existing products" is off.
skipReasonHelp.empty_row: None of the mapped columns held a value for this row.
skipReasonHelp.all_columns_unmapped: No columns are mapped to product fields — nothing in this row will be applied.

anomaly.missing_required_on_create: Required field missing on create row

importing.title: Importing
importing.subtitle: Your CSV is being processed.
importing.slowChunk: Processing row {row} — this may take a few seconds
importing.notificationAsk: Allow notifications when the import finishes?
importing.notificationDenied: Notifications are blocked — enable them in your browser settings.

rollback.banner: You can roll this import back for the next 24 hours

history.title: Product import history
history.subtitle: Every import you've run. Download error reports or roll back recent imports here.

Products.title: Products
Products.subtitle: Manage your product catalog.
Products.newSubtitle: Capture the essentials now; variations and media can be added later.

list.title: Products
list.trashDescription: Are you sure you want to move "{name}" to the trash?
list.emptyDescription: Add your first product to get started.
list.filteredEmptyDescription: Adjust or clear the filters to see more results.
list.bulkForceSkipped: {count} product(s) skipped — they're in an active order
list.bulkTrashDescription: {count} products will be moved to the trash. Continue?
list.bulkForceDescription: {count} products will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

quickEdit.title: Quick edit
quickEdit.pricingInventoryHint: Sale prices and stock state ride together.
quickEdit.organizationHint: Where this product lives in the catalog.
quickEdit.name: Product name
quickEdit.gtinHint: Global Trade Item Number — improves search visibility on Google Shopping.
quickEdit.saleScheduleHint: Leave empty for an always-on sale.
quickEdit.manageStockHint: Track stock at the product level
quickEdit.lowStockThresholdHint: Shows a warning badge when quantity drops to this.

emptyHint.title: Add your first product
emptyHint.description: Adding products brings your storefront to life.

forceDelete.title: Delete permanently?
forceDelete.description: "{name}" will be deleted permanently. This cannot be undone.
forceDelete.skippedActiveOrder: This product is referenced by an active order — cancel the order first.

sections.howItSells: How this product sells & its structure

tooltips.type: Simple = standalone. Variable = has variations. Grouped = a bundle. External = link to another site.
tooltips.name: Shown in the storefront, search, cart, and order emails.
tooltips.slug: URL identifier. Auto-generated from the name when left blank.
tooltips.shortDescription: Excerpt shown above the storefront fold.
tooltips.description: Full body of the product page.
tooltips.regularPrice: Base price in Toman before discount.
tooltips.salePrice: Discounted price; replaces the regular price when set.
tooltips.saleWindow: Sale price only applies between these dates.
tooltips.sku: Internal id for inventory and reports.
tooltips.gtin: Global Trade Item Number; useful for marketplaces.

descriptions.simple: No options — one price, one SKU.
descriptions.variable: Shopper picks between options (color, size, ...) before checkout.

conflictDialog.title: Concurrent edits
conflictDialog.message: This product changed since you loaded it. Reload or overwrite with your changes.

featuredImage.removeShiftsGalleryHint: Removing the featured image promotes the next gallery image to featured.

variations.placeholderBody: Variation management ships in the next iteration.
variations.notVariableHint: Switch the product type to Variable to enable variations.

empty.noAttributesDescription: Add at least one attribute above and turn on 'Use for variations' before generating.
empty.attributesReadyDescription: Calibra can generate {count} variation(s) from the current attributes.

sellingMode.title: How does this product sell?
sellingMode.subtitle: The selling mode controls what the shopper has to pick before they can buy.

oneVersion.title: One version
oneVersion.description: When the shopper doesn't need to choose a color, size, capacity, or any other option.
oneVersion.result: One price, one SKU, one stock pool.

multipleVersions.title: Multiple versions
multipleVersions.description: When the shopper picks between options like color, size, capacity, or storage before buying.
multipleVersions.example: Example: iPhone 15 Pro — shopper picks color and storage
multipleVersions.result: Each version can have its own price, stock, SKU, and image.

customizable.title: Customizable by the customer
customizable.description: When the shopper personalises the product: engraving, gift wrap, custom text, uploaded file.

grouped.title: Grouped
grouped.description: A bundle of related products displayed together.

external.title: External
external.description: A link to an external site for checkout.

sellingMode.switchToVariableNotice: Your current price and SKU become the defaults for newly generated versions.

convertToOneVersion.title: Convert to 'One version'
convertToOneVersion.body: This product currently has {count} sellable versions. Switching to 'One version' removes choices from the storefront.
convertToOneVersion.keepOne: Keep one version as the main product

specs.title: Specs
specs.subtitle: Specs describe the product — they inform the shopper, but they don't create choosable options.
specs.empty: Add specs like material, color, size, capacity, or compatibility. Specs help shoppers understand the product but don't create sellable versions.
specs.emptyWantChoicesHint: Want the shopper to pick between options (color, size, …)? Switch the selling mode to 'Multiple versions'.

row.name: Name
row.valuesPlaceholder: Type a value and press Enter
row.showOnProductPageTooltip: When on, this spec is listed in the specifications table on the product page.

specs.multiValueWarning: You've added multiple values. Should the shopper pick between them?
specs.freeFormCannotBeChoice: Free-form specs can't become customer choices. Create a global spec first.

choices.title: Customer choices
choices.subtitle: Options the shopper picks before adding to cart — like color, size, or storage.
choices.empty: No choices yet. For example, an iPhone might have 'Color' and 'Storage' choices. Each combination becomes a sellable version.
choices.addChoice: Add a choice from global specs

row.combinationCount: This choice combined with the others makes {count} versions.
row.singleValueWarning: This choice has only one value. If the shopper can't pick anything else, move it to Specs.

choices.warnLarge: That's a lot of versions. Use bulk editing so you don't get them wrong.
choices.blockTooMany: Reduce the number of choices or values.
choices.ifVariableRequired: To add a choice, the selling mode switches to 'Multiple versions'.

explainer.title: How does this work? (Example)
explainer.footer: Each version can have its own price, stock, SKU, and image.

choices.migrationNotice: Previous 'variations' have been renamed to 'sellable versions'. The data hasn't changed — only the labels for clarity.

versions.title: Sellable versions
versions.subtitle: Every combination of choices becomes a sellable version. Edit price, stock, SKU, and image per version here.
versions.notVariableHint: Switch the selling mode to 'Multiple versions' to enable sellable versions.
versions.needChoicesDescription: Add at least one customer choice with multiple values in the Customer choices card to generate sellable versions.

checklist.title: Setup checklist
checklist.images: Add an image for every active version

bulkDeleteDialog.title: Delete selected versions
bulkDeleteDialog.ordersPreserved: Versions referenced by existing orders are archived instead of deleted.

regenerateDialog.title: Generate sellable versions
regenerateDialog.summaryOutdated: {count} versions no longer match any combination
regenerateDialog.draftNote: New versions are created as drafts so you can review before publishing.

setPriceDialog.title: Bulk price update
setPriceDialog.preview: Preview on the first three versions:
setPriceDialog.previewEmpty: Nothing to change — none of the selected versions have a base price.
setPriceDialog.skippedNoBasePrice: {count} versions have no base price and are skipped by percent change.

skuGenerator.title: Generate SKUs
skuGenerator.subtitle: Build SKUs from the product code and each choice value.
skuGenerator.patternHint: Write `product` for the product code and each choice by its name, wrapped in braces.
skuGenerator.collisionWarning: {count} duplicates detected. Adjust the pattern or shortened values.

toasts.deleteRefused: This version is referenced by orders — archived instead of deleted

versions.deletedWithOrdersFallback: This version is referenced by orders — archived instead of deleted.
versions.noResultsDescription: Clear the filters to see every version again.
versions.emptyDescription: Click 'Rebuild from choices' to generate the first versions from the customer choices.

empty.title: Start by adding attributes
empty.description: Attributes like 'Size' and 'Color' help customers pick the right version. For variable products they also define the variations you sell. Create attributes themselves on the Products › Attributes page.

newAttribute.valuesHelp: Enter the options customers can choose from — e.g. 'Blue' or 'Large'. Press Enter after each value.
newAttribute.valuesPlaceholder: Type a value and press Enter

attributes.customNotSavedWarning: {count} custom attributes are not saved yet — click 'Save attributes' to persist them.

tooltips.showOnProductPage: When on, this attribute shows up in the spec table on the storefront product page.
tooltips.useForVariations: Turn on so this attribute drives the cartesian variation generator.
tooltips.useForVariationsDisabled: Switch the product type to Variable to enable this.
tooltips.useForVariationsCustom: Custom attributes can't drive variation generation yet.

toolbar.searchPlaceholder: Search categories by name or slug

deleteDialog.title: Delete this category?
deleteDialog.description: Deleting "{name}" detaches it from every product and orphans its children to the next ancestor. This cannot be undone.

bulkDeleteDialog.title: Delete {count} categories?
bulkDeleteDialog.description: These categories are detached from every product and their children are orphaned to the next ancestor. This cannot be undone.

empty.title: No categories yet
empty.description: Categories give your storefront its shape — start with a top-level one like "Clothing" or "Home".

noResults.title: Nothing matches
noResults.description: Try a shorter term, or change the filter pill above.

slug.label: Slug
slug.hint: Used in the storefront URL. Lowercase letters, numbers and dashes only.

description.label: Description
description.placeholder: Optional — appears on the category landing page.
description.todo: Backend doesn't persist descriptions yet — content is saved locally for preview.

cover.label: Cover image
cover.placeholder: Drop an image or click to upload

footer.newHint: Press Enter or Save to add this category.
footer.editHint: Changes apply locally until the backend save endpoint ships.

empty.title: Select a category to edit
empty.subtitle: Pick a row from the tree, or start a new one. Categories live in a hierarchy — drag rows in the tree to reorder or to nest one under another.
empty.tip1: Drag the grip handle to move a row.
empty.tip2: Drag horizontally while moving to nest under a sibling.
empty.tip3: Use "Add child" inside the row menu for quick branching.

bulk.selected: {count, plural, one {# tag selected} other {# tags selected}}

empty.title: No tags yet
empty.description: Tags let shoppers narrow the catalog by theme — "sale", "new arrival", "limited edition". Add your first one from the form on the left.

noResults.title: Nothing matches
noResults.description: Try a shorter search term, or switch the filter pill above.

name.label: Name
name.hint: The label shoppers see on chips and filters.

slug.label: Slug
slug.hint: Used in the storefront URL. Lowercase letters, numbers and dashes only.

description.label: Description
description.placeholder: Optional — appears on the tag landing page.
description.hint: Some themes render this on the tag archive page.

footer.newHint: Hit Enter or Save to add this tag.
footer.editHint: Changes save to the catalog immediately.

empty.title: Pick a tag, or start a new one
empty.subtitle: Select a row from the list to edit it, or create a new tag from scratch. Tags are flat — there is no parent / child structure.
empty.tip1: Click any row to edit it in place.
empty.tip2: Use the language toggle to author both fa and en at once.
empty.tip3: Bulk-delete from the list when cleaning up unused tags.

deleteDialog.title: Delete this tag?
deleteDialog.description: Removing "{name}" detaches it from every product. The action cannot be undone.

bulkDeleteDialog.title: Delete {count} tags?
bulkDeleteDialog.description: Each selected tag is detached from every product it belonged to. The action cannot be undone.

Brands.title: Brands
Brands.subtitle: Brands available in the catalog.
Brands.subtitleStats: {total} brands · {attachments} product links · {unused} with no products

empty.title: No brands yet
empty.description: Brands help customers browse the catalog by maker. Add the first one with the form on the side.

noResults.title: Nothing found
noResults.description: Try a shorter search term or change the filter above.

name.label: Brand name
name.hint: Shown in store filters and on product pages.

slug.label: Slug
slug.hint: Used in the storefront URL. Lowercase letters, digits, and dashes only.

description.label: Description
description.placeholder: Optional — shown on the brand archive page.
description.hint: Some themes render this on the brand archive page.

footer.newHint: Press Enter or Save to add this brand.
footer.editHint: Changes are saved to the catalog immediately.

empty.title: Select a brand or create a new one
empty.subtitle: Pick a row from the list to edit, or start a new brand.
empty.tip1: Click any row to edit it inline.
empty.tip2: The slug is used in storefront URLs — a short ASCII name reads best.
empty.tip3: Use bulk delete to clear out brands with no products.

deleteDialog.title: Delete this brand?
deleteDialog.description: Deleting "{name}" detaches it from every product. This cannot be undone.

bulkDeleteDialog.title: Delete {count} brands?
bulkDeleteDialog.description: Each brand is detached from its products. This cannot be undone.

Attributes.title: Product attributes
Attributes.subtitle: Attributes like color and material used by product variations.

empty.title: No attributes yet
empty.description: Define attributes like "color" or "size" here, then configure the allowed terms on each attribute's page.

name.label: Name
name.hint: Shown in filters and in the variations form.

slug.label: Slug (code)
slug.hint: Used in the URL and as the attribute code — lowercase letters, digits, and dashes only.

hasArchives.label: Enable archive page?
hasArchives.hint: When on, the storefront builds a dedicated archive page for each term of this attribute.

orderBy.label: Default term order
orderBy.hint: Terms appear in the storefront in this order.

footer.newHint: After creating, add allowed terms from the attribute's own page.
footer.editHint: Changes are saved to the catalog immediately.

empty.title: Select an attribute or create a new one
empty.subtitle: Click any row to edit it, or use the form on the side to add a new attribute.
empty.tip1: The slug is also the attribute's API code — usable from integrations.
empty.tip2: Turn on the archive page to surface this attribute as a storefront filter.
empty.tip3: Manage each attribute's terms from its row via "Configure".

deleteDialog.title: Delete this attribute?
deleteDialog.description: Deleting "{name}" removes the attribute and every one of its terms from the catalog. This cannot be undone.

bulkDeleteDialog.title: Delete {count} attributes?
bulkDeleteDialog.description: The attributes and their terms are removed from the catalog. This cannot be undone.

empty.title: No terms yet
empty.description: Add the first term with the form on the side — e.g. "Red" under the "Color" attribute.

name.label: Term name
name.hint: Shown on filters and product cards.

slug.label: Slug
slug.hint: Used in the term's archive URL — lowercase letters, digits, and dashes only.

description.label: Description
description.placeholder: Optional — shown on the term archive page.
description.hint: Some themes render this on the term archive page.

footer.newHint: Press Enter or Save to add this term.
footer.editHint: Changes are saved to the catalog immediately.

empty.title: Select a term or create a new one
empty.subtitle: Click any row to edit it, or use the form on the side to add a new term.
empty.tip1: Slugs must be unique among the terms of this attribute.
empty.tip2: Use bulk delete to clear out unused terms.

deleteDialog.title: Delete this term?
deleteDialog.description: Deleting "{name}" detaches it from every product that uses it. This cannot be undone.

bulkDeleteDialog.title: Delete {count} terms?
bulkDeleteDialog.description: These terms are detached from every product that uses them. This cannot be undone.
